creator: dave@jetcafe.org
text:
Just another datapoint. If I get a panic really early on (e.g. a fatal 
trap 12 during the very first part of the kernel's booting process) I 
experience this same issue. I've dropped to a debugger, but can't trace 
what happened because the keyboard does not work.

Using a PS/2 does not work as this machine has no PS/2 keyboard 
interface. :)
-- 
Dave Hayes - Consultant - Altadena CA, USA - dave@jetcafe.org

Anarchism is founded on the observation that since few
are wise enough to rule themselves, even fewer are wise
enough to rule others.
                                             - Edward Abbey
